title: Coil-built decorative lidded jar
notes: A wide-shouldered jar with a push-in slab lid. Body built from stacked coils, blended inside and left textured outside (deliberate unblended coil ridges as decoration). Lid is a flat slab circle with a pinched-up knob handle. Approximately 150 mm tall, 120 mm diameter at shoulder. Used as a desk tidy, jewellery jar, or decorative storage.
